screen.mappywall.tasks.title: MappyWall Jobs
screen.mappywall.tasks.empty: No jobs in this world and dimension.
screen.mappywall.config.title: MappyWall Setup
screen.mappywall.auto_locked: Automatic modes are planned after the manual MVP.
screen.mappywall.auto_walk_note: AUTO_WALK controls forward movement; press K to stop.
screen.mappywall.scale_note: Note: MVP auto-opening only supports empty maps at scale 0.
hud.mappywall.pause_hint: Press U to pause/resume, M for jobs
hud.mappywall.open_anywhere_in_region: Open the map anywhere inside the target region
hud.mappywall.scale_needs_existing_map: This scale cannot be opened from empty maps; MVP will not consume empty maps here
hud.mappywall.auto_walk_active: Auto walk enabled; press K to stop
message.mappywall.stopped: MappyWall job stopped and HUD hidden.
message.mappywall.project_inactive: This job is complete and cannot be activated.
message.mappywall.order_empty: This MappyWall job does not have any map bindings to print yet.
message.mappywall.scale_requires_existin: Heads up: vanilla empty maps only open at scale 0. MVP will not auto-open empty maps for scale 1-4 jobs.
message.mappywall.open_unverified: MappyWall tried to open a map but could not reliably identify the new map id, so it paused to avoid consuming more empty maps.
message.mappywall.auto_walk_enabled: AUTO_WALK enabled: MappyWall will control forward movement. Press K to stop.
message.mappywall.auto_walk_stuck: AUTO_WALK detected a collision or stalled movement and paused.
message.mappywall.emergency_stop: MappyWall emergency-stopped and paused the job.
message.mappywall.auto_disabled: Automatic movement is disabled in this MVP.
